search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20063` $advanced_filter$ | `dedup_timechart_events` | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | `get_iface_name(input_iface, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_iface, output_snmp)` | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(flow_count)` | eventstats latest(dest_host) as l_dest_host by exp_ip dest_ip | `format_ip_column(dest_ip_string, dest_ip, l_dest_host)` | timechart sum(flow_count) by dest_ip_string useother="f"

`netflow_search_rule_20063` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(flow_count)` | eventstats sum(flow_count) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport dest_host | `get_iface_name(input_iface, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_iface, output_snmp)` | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(packets_in)` | eventstats latest(dest_host) as l_dest_host by exp_ip dest_ip | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(packets_in) as sumpacketsin sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount by exp_ip dest_ip l_dest_host _time sum_by_exp | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sparkline(sum(sumbytes)) as TrafficLine sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by exp_ip dest_ip l_dest_host sum_by_exp | sort 0 - Connections | eval pct = Connections*100/sum_by_exp | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | `default_preparation_for_comma_formatted_table` | table dest_ip l_dest_host exp_ip_name "Max Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" pct TrafficLine "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename dest_ip as "Destination IP" | rename l_dest_host as "Destination Host" | rename TrafficLine as "Traffic Line" | rename pct as "% of Total"

chart.title: Top 10 Source IPs and Connections for $submitted:Destination IP$

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20063` $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") (dest_ip="$Destination IP$" OR dest_host="$Destination IP$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | `get_iface_name(input_iface, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_iface, output_snmp)` | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(flow_count)` | eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by exp_ip src_ip | `format_ip_column(src_ip_string, src_ip, l_src_host)` | timechart sum(flow_count) by src_ip_string useother="f"

`netflow_search_rule_20063` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(flow_count)` | eventstats sum(flow_count) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" $advanced_filter$ (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") (dest_ip="$Destination IP$" OR dest_host="$Destination IP$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | `get_iface_name(input_iface, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_iface, output_snmp)` | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(packets_in)` | `conversation(Connections,"$span_token$",$span_int$,$range$)`

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10063: Top Connections Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20063). This Module identifies hosts with the most connections. It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Module execution interval) which all have the same combination of Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol, Input interface, Output interface. This Module is packaged in NFO “Network Traffic and Devices Monitor” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
